basic_details.job_title: NIT Kurukshetra Adjunct Faculty Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Technology Kurukshetra (NIT Kurukshetra) Adjunct Faculty Notification 2026 has been released on the official website NIT Kurukshetra. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the NIT Kurukshetra Adjunct Faculty Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Post-graduate/Ph.D. degree may not be essential for industry/research candidates
qualification.details: Adjunct Faculty: Accomplished professional in chosen field, Comparable to top one third of regular faculty. Experience: Normally 10 years, 5 years for emerging/cutting-edge technologies.

selection_process: Short-listing based on qualifications and experience Presentation and interview
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for NIT Kurukshetra Adjunct Faculty Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.nitkkr.ac.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 15-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for NIT Kurukshetra Adjunct Faculty?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application for the first round of recruitment at the National Institute of Technology Kurukshetra is 15 May 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How can I apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Candidates need to download the application form from the official website, fill it out, attach the required documents, and send it via post to the Registrar, NIT Kurukshetra, Haryana.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any application fee for this post?
faq.answer: No, the official notification for the Adjunct Faculty recruitment at NIT Kurukshetra does not mention any application fee for the candidates applying for these positions.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary for an Adjunct Professor?
faq.answer: An Adjunct Professor at NIT Kurukshetra can receive a monthly ceiling of up to Rs. 1,80,000, with specific daily and hourly rates as defined in the notification.

faq.question: Q5. What is the required experience for this role?
faq.answer: Candidates are generally expected to have at least 10 years of professional experience in their field, though this is reduced to 5 years for those working in emerging or cutting-edge technologies.

faq.question: Q6. Is a Ph.D. mandatory for this position?
faq.answer: A Post-graduate or Ph.D. degree may not be essential for industry or research candidates, provided they are accomplished professionals in their chosen field of expertise.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process?
faq.answer: The selection process involves two main stages: short-listing of candidates based on their qualifications and experience, followed by a presentation and a personal interview.

faq.question: Q8. Where should I send my application?
faq.answer: The application should be sent to The Registrar, National Institute of Technology, Kurukshetra-136119 (Haryana). Ensure the post and department are mentioned on the envelope.

faq.question: Q9. Is this a permanent job?
faq.answer: No, this recruitment is for Adjunct Faculty positions, which are contractual in nature and intended for professionals to contribute to the institute's academic environment.

faq.question: Q10. Can I apply if I am from the industry?
faq.answer: Yes, the institute specifically encourages accomplished professionals from the industry to apply, as the role is designed to bridge the gap between industry expertise and academic teaching.
